title: better items
description: a reskin of the tools to make them better
body:
a pack thats supossed to make your items better while fighting. custom made pack with 3d models requires optiffine or sodium!!!!!.credits to blockbench and i will be updating this join my discord for suggestions and if u need help👍


**IF U HAVE AN IDEA JOIN DISCORD IM ALMOST ALWAYS ACTIVE AND IM TRYING TO BUILD A COMMUNITY more info below**

this is my first resource pack i still dont know that much so if u got any tips or ideas join discrod [https://discord.gg/vCeZyJXb](https://discord.gg/vCeZyJXb)

VERSION 1.3 beta is out
i launched the beta version of 1.3 it makes the items smaller i also added the deafult dark mode but the anvil and the smithing table are glitched im thinking about changing the golden apple please give me feedback 🥲
